text: Create a [BuilderGuide], comparing the creation from the root [Shape] to the blueprint given by the path.
params: A file path to the builder guide blueprint.
Root [Shape] for comparing the creation from.
Should block uuid be ignored for stage completion. (Defaults to false)
Should errors be recorded. Needed for getErrorInfo (Defaults to false)
Should extra blocks be ignored for stage completion. (Defaults to true)
